description.zh-Hans: 使用基于沃罗诺伊的有机形状构造生成风格化像素艺术岩石和圆石，可配置锯齿度和颜色变化。
description.en: Generates stylized pixel art rocks and boulders using Voronoi-based organic shape construction with configurable jaggedness and color variation.

triggers.zh-Hans: 岩石, 石头, 圆石, 碎石, 矿物, 山石
triggers.en: rock, stone, boulder, rubble, mineral, crag

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成风格化岩石，用于场景装饰或作为道具元素。
exampleUsage.en: Generate stylized rocks for scene decoration or as prop elements.
